summary: Iteration 59: Bug Fix Verification - Rice Sale cash_paid/diesel_paid appearing in Truck Payments + Rice Sale jama entry in Cash Book. All 11 backend tests PASSED. All UI flows verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend payments.py get_truck_payments (line 146-189): Now includes rice_sales with cash_paid/diesel_paid > 0, setting source='Rice Sale'
Backend private_trading.py _create_cashbook_for_rice_sale (line 284-353): Creates jama entry (rice_sale_jama) for total_amount, plus cash/diesel entries for truck ledger
Backend private_trading.py delete_rice_sale (line 391-403): Cascade deletes cash_transactions, diesel_accounts, private_payments linked to rice sale

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Rice Sale bug fixes verified

seed_data_creation: TestRice entry created and deleted during test - verified end-to-end flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Rice Sale cash_paid/diesel_paid now appear in Truck Payments (GET /api/truck-payments) with source='Rice Sale'. 2) Rice Sale total amount creates jama entry in Cash Book Party Summary with party_type='Rice Sale'. Sillu entry (ID: 0e1f5460) with OR08E2455 truck is existing test data.

bug_1_rice_sale_truck_payments.description: Rice Sale cash_paid/diesel_paid were not appearing in Truck Payments page
verification: GET /api/truck-payments now includes rice_sales entries with truck_no
Sillu (OR08E2455) appears with cash_taken=500, diesel_taken=500, source='Rice Sale'
Created TestRice with TEST-TRUCK, cash=1000, diesel=500 - appeared correctly
DELETE rice sale removes entry from Truck Payments

bug_2_rice_sale_cashbook_jama.description: Rice Sale total amount was not creating jama/kharch entry in Cash Book/Ledger
verification: GET /api/cash-book/party-summary shows Sillu with party_type='Rice Sale', total_jama=700000
Creating new rice sale creates jama entry with reference 'rice_sale_jama:{id}'
DELETE rice sale removes jama entry from Cash Book

frontend.create_rice_sale_testrice: PASSED - TestRice with RST999, 20Q, Rs.1500, TEST-TRUCK, Cash=1000, Diesel=500

frontend.delete_testrice_cascade: PASSED - Removed from both Truck Payments and Party Summary
